## Fixed

- **Synapse refused to start (502 Bad Gateway at the reverse proxy) when URL
  previews were enabled.** The rendered `homeserver-overrides.yaml` set
  `url_preview_enabled: true` but did **not** include the
  `url_preview_ip_range_blacklist` that Synapse *requires* whenever URL previews
  are on. Synapse treats the missing blacklist as a fatal config error and exits
  on startup, so the homeserver never comes up and the reverse proxy returns
  `502 Bad Gateway`.

  This was latent until **v2.0.0** — earlier builds silently ignored the overrides
  file (the old `include_config_files` approach Synapse never honored), so
  `url_preview_enabled: true` never actually took effect. Now that the overrides
  are loaded via `--config-path`, the missing blacklist surfaces as a startup
  crash.

  The override template now ships the **standard upstream IP blacklist** (SSRF
  protection — the link-preview fetcher cannot probe private / internal IP ranges),
  so URL previews keep working **and** Synapse starts.

### Upgrade

**Force Update** the container. `homeserver-overrides.yaml` is regenerated from the
template on every start, so the fix applies automatically — no data changes, no
manual editing required.

If you need the server up *before* pulling the new image, add the same
`url_preview_ip_range_blacklist:` block to `/data/homeserver.yaml` (that file is
not regenerated) and restart the container.
